title: Remove quarters from Gantt widget
excerpt: My org is not on a calendar year but an Aug 1st to July 31 FY, which makes the Gantt widget unusable when selecting the Month or Year. I need the ability to supress quarters from appearing.

posts.author: ssauer (Shari Sauer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot Gantt1840×332 32.2 KB

My org is not on a calendar year but an Aug 1st to July 31 FY, which makes the Gantt widget unusable when selecting the Month or Year. I need the ability to supress quarters from appearing.
